user_prompt: Triage this ticket: 'My account got charged twice this month, please refund the duplicate.'
actual_output:
**Priority:** HIGH
**Category:** Billing - Duplicate Charge

**Draft response:**

Hi there,

I am so sorry to hear that you’ve been charged twice this month. I completely understand how concerning that is, and I want to get this sorted out for you immediately.

I am currently looking into your billing history to identify the duplicate transaction. 

To help me resolve this as quickly as possible, could you please provide:
1. The last four digits of the card that was charged.
2. The date of the duplicate transaction (if you have it handy).

Once I confirm the duplicate charge on our end, I will process the refund immediately. You should see the funds returned to your account within 3–5 business days, depending on your bank.

Thank you for your patience while I fix this for you.

Best,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to triage the ticket and draft an empathetic, solution-oriented response according to the provided guidelines.
